basic_details.organization_name: Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB)
basic_details.short_information: Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Consultant (Engineering) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from the date of publication of the indicative advertisement in this regard in the Employment News

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 61 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Engineering, MBA in Marketing, Master's degree in Science/Economics/Operations Research or equivalent
qualification.details: Consultant (Engineering) - Level II & III: Graduate Degree in Engineering / MBA in Marketing / Master's degree in Science / Economics / Operations Research or equivalent from a recognized University or institution.

salary_details.details: Consultant (Engineering) - Level II: Rs. 90,000 Per Month Consultant (Engineering) - Level III: Rs. 1,20,000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PNGRB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pngrb.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.petroleum_and_natural_gas_regulatory_boa: Graduate Degree in Engineering, MBA in Marketing, Master's degree in Science/Economics/Operations Research or equivalent
15 days from the date of publication of the indicative advertisement in this regard in the Employment News

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PNGRB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PNGRB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Consultant (Engineering) - Level II & III: Graduate Degree in Engineering / MBA in Marketing / Master's degree in Science / Economics / Operations Research or equivalent from a recognized University or institution.

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 61 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: PNGRB Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consultant (Engineering) - Level II: Rs. 90,000 Per Month Consultant (Engineering) - Level III: Rs. 1,20,000 Per Month

rows.date: 15 days from the date of publication of the indicative advertisement in this regard in the Employment News

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PNGRB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: pngrb.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts is 29th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Engineering) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Graduate Degree in Engineering, MBA in Marketing, or a Master's degree in Science/Economics/Operations Research or equivalent from a recognized University or institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant (Engineering) posts is 61 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Engineering) positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 90,000 to Rs. 1,20,000 per month, depending on the level of the consultant position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Engineering) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant (Engineering) post, divided into two levels: Level II and Level III, with one vacancy for each.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for PNGRB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the PNGRB Consultant (Engineering) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the PNGRB located?
faq.answer: The Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.
